notes: v1.14.54 - ENTER BUTTON FIX HANDOFF (3 traceable fixes to the GATEWAY ring-port; scope-locked to the entry button + the wordmark filter; hold/enter JS body untouched). FIX 1 (REGRESSION, priority): hold did nothing on device. Root cause confirmed by a real hit-test (document.elementFromPoint at the button center returned an SVG <line> seam with pointer-events:auto, NOT #pe-stage) - the SVG aperture overlay (z-index above the rings) was the top hit target and lacks touch-action:none (only #pe-stage has it), so on iOS the hold got scroll-cancelled. FIX = '#boot .pe-stage svg { pointer-events:none; }' so the press falls THROUGH to #pe-stage; re-verified elementFromPoint(center) now === DIV#pe-stage (svgPE none) and the entry chain fires boot->app. My earlier headless pass was a false positive (dispatchEvent fires directly on #pe-stage, bypassing hit-testing). No enter/nav logic added or changed. FIX 2 (depth rebuild, CSS-only): the port read flat (linear fills + strokes) - rebuilt with layered radial-gradients: bezel + rings now have a bright UPPER-rim specular (single top light = the globe above) + a lower-rim shadow + groove edges so they read as milled metal; ring3 is a recessed dark well; the core is bigger (40->54px) and a multi-stop white-hot bloom (#fff -> #dff7ff -> cyan -> fade), brighter/larger. Cyan accent + filament kept; reduced-motion still static (animations untouched). FIX 3 (wordmark cool-down): the baked iridescent WebP wasn't re-rendered - added a scoped CSS filter to the wordmark IMAGE only: '#boot .pm-wordmark { filter:saturate(0.7) hue-rotate(-18deg) brightness(1.04); }' (handoff starting values; John tunes on device) - tones down the hot-pink/80s read toward cool violet/steel/cyan. Cyan is the LOCKED accent (gold rejected, not reverted). Gates: node --check 3/3, main <style> braces 2690/2690, four stamps lockstep v1.14.54, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF, 132px tap, zero overflow, scoped #boot/#pe-. Render-verified depth + cooler wordmark + FIX1 hit-test + entry. DEVICE (John, iPhone, close+reopen to clear SW cache): (1) hold charges AND warps into HOME (FIX1), (2) port reads lit/dimensional not flat (FIX2), (3) wordmark cool not 80s (FIX3 - tune the filter values to taste). STILL PENDING from v1.14.49: the ?cal=1 mesh-node calibration pass.
